general.name: CyberArk EPM Notifications
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>373793B3-1F4B-4063-91AF-3A8A61BC05CF</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>373793B3-1F4B-4063-91AF-3A8A61BC05CF</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CyberArk EPM Notifications</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Notifications Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>11C98791-10B5-4C68-81DC-EF4AACEC0381</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>AB184E88-A5B8-4B4D-B342-12AD0E50E5DB</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>NotificationSettings</key><array><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>1</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.cyberark.cyberarkepmuiagent</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><true/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>2</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.cyberark.cyberarkepmuiagent</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><true/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict></array></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: HBC ABM - The Bay Enrolled PreStage
